news_title: CTW Launches Pre-Registration for Simulation Game Adaptation of Hit Anime The Apothecary Diaries
summary: CTW Cayman (NASDAQ:CTW)has launched pre-registration forThe Apothecary Diaries Palace Chronicles, a browser-based simulation game adaptation of the hit anime series The Apothecary Diaries. The game will be available on CTW's HTML5 platformG123.jp.Players can access the game across multiple devices without installation, featuring characters like Maomao, Jinshi, and Gyokuyou. The original anime has achieved significant success, ranking#1 in streaming on ABEMA in Japanand receiving recognition in the U.S. as one of the "best anime of 2024" by Polygon.This release joins CTW's portfolio of popular game adaptations, with12 games currently in pre-registrationand10 additional titles in development.
